mnemonics: MAP Your App: Memory (Mnemonics), Aids (Application), Points (Development)
keyPoints: Focus on one module's question to demonstrate depth of knowledge.
Ensure the chosen question covers a major, core concept of the module.
Structure your answer clearly with an introduction, explanation, and conclusion.
commonMistakes: Selecting a question from the wrong module.
Choosing a minor, simple question that doesn't showcase understanding.
Answering multiple questions superficially instead of one in depth.
